description:
You are an oncology pharmacist. A patient with HIV and ALK-positive lung cancer is starting Crizotinib. Using the Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app, determine whether Ritonavir or Raltegravir is safer to co-administer with Crizotinib. Create a result file at /sdcard/crizotinib_hiv_safety.txt with exactly 4 lines:
Line 1: Name of the SAFER drug
Line 2: Traffic light color of the SAFER drug
Line 3: Name of the RISKY drug
Line 4: Traffic light color of the RISKY drug
